title: taraxacum ochrochlorum
intro: Taraxacum ochrochlorum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues, due to its bitter and anti-inflammatory compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Taraxacum ochrochlorum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
